task_completion.description: Access the 'demodb' database and navigate to the 'Hotels' class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OrientDB Studio (web GUI) or console showing a connection to 'demodb' and a query or schema view for the 'Hotels' class.

task_completion.description: Standardize all 'City' field values to Title Case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An UPDATE query modifying the 'City' field (e.g., using a capitalize or title case function), or a data browse view showing City names properly capitalized (e.g., 'Rome', 'New York', 'Berlin').

task_completion.description: Create a new property named 'Location' of type 'OPoint'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A schema view showing the 'Hotels' class with a new property 'Location' of type 'OPoint', or a CREATE PROPERTY query.

task_completion.description: Populate the 'Location' property for all records using existing 'Latitude' and 'Longitude' values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An UPDATE query mapping Latitude and Longitude to the new Location property, or a data view showing the 'Location' column populated with coordinate data (e.g., JSON objects with coordinates) for the 15 hotel records.

task_completion.description: Create a SPATIAL index on the 'Location' property.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An Indexes view in OrientDB Studio showing an index on 'Hotels.Location' of type 'SPATIAL', or a CREATE INDEX query specifying SPATIAL.

task_completion.description: Retain the legacy Latitude and Longitude columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Schema or data browse views showing that 'Latitude' and 'Longitude' properties still exist alongside the new 'Location' property.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OrientDB software (Studio GUI or console).
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OrientDB Studio web interface or a terminal running the OrientDB console, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Queries were actually executed and applied to the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of success messages, execution times, or 'records updated' confirmations (e.g., 'Updated 15 record(s)') in the OrientDB interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not drop or delete the original coordinate columns.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of 'DROP PROPERTY Hotels.Latitude' or 'DROP PROPERTY Hotels.Longitude' commands in the query history.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Database: 'demodb'. Target Class: 'Hotels'. The task requires creating a property named 'Location' of type 'OPoint' and an index of type 'SPATIAL'. The Hotels class contains 15 real-world hotel records. The Location property must be populated using the existing Latitude and Longitude values, and the legacy Latitude and Longitude columns must remain intact.
